title: JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 Released @ jeemain.nta.nic.in

detail.title: JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 Released @ jeemain.nta.nic.in
detail.short_info: JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 - The Result of National Testing Agency 2025 is released for Mains Session 2 Paper-II at jeemain.nta.nic.in and all the concerned candidates can look up for the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 online. All those who took the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 (Mains Session 2 Paper-II) can view their JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 through Online mode. Candidates will not be informed about the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 through any offline modes. For more details on the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025, read this article.

sections.heading: JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 Released @ jeemain.nta.nic.in

content.text: JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 is Out! - JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 has been released on 23-05-2025 Online Result for Mains Session 2 Paper-II Examinations.
The official link to check the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 is activated and is released officially
Check here - JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 (Link Activated)
Declaration of Final NTA Scores for Joint Entrance Examination (Main) - 2025 for Paper-2A (B. Arch) and Paper-2B (B. Planning) - reg - Click Here (PDF)

sections.heading: JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025 Overview
How to download the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025?

content.text: The process is given below to download the National Testing Agency Result 2025, and candidates follow the instructions to download the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II Result 2025.

items: Visit the official site of the JEE Mains Session 2 Paper-II @ jeemain.nta.nic.in
There, you can see the home page of the organization.
Check for the Results section on the screen.
On that page, you can see the program code along with the name of the examination.
There, you need to check the Exam Results release date, choose the desired one.
Then, you all need to click on it.
A list of declared results will appear on the screen.
Choose your course.
The student will navigate to another page.
Here, they will enter the application ID/ Roll Number and submit it.
The result will appear on the screen.
Save the visible Results 2025.

seo_tags: JEE Mains Session 2 Paper II Result 2025 Out
